chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-480 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of M.A.No.1722/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.08.2025 Mr. Oshaque Ali Sangi, Asstt. Attorney General. -.-.-.-.- Petitioner is present in person, submits that the respondents have rectified the error in respect of wrong billing, hence purpose of this petition as well as directions issued by this Court have been complied with, therefore, he does not wish to press it, which is not opposed by learned Assistant Attorney General. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
